description_long: This is a pair of open-toe flip-flop sandals featuring a predominantly gray footbed with visible white stitching along the perimeter. The upper straps are a bold red color with black accents and a central black thong post connecting to the sole. The footbed displays a decorative emblem near the heel area, adding a touch of branding or style. The sole appears moderately thick, providing some cushioning and support, and the overall design is casual and suitable for warm weather. The materials suggest a combination of synthetic rubber and plastic, making the sandals lightweight and water-resistant.
description: A pair of red and gray flip-flop sandals with black accents, white stitching, and a decorative emblem on the footbed. The design is casual, open-toe, and suitable for everyday urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, red straps, and decorative emblem on the footbed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the sole, the curve of the red straps, and the emblem near the heel.
description_view_2: Direct front view focusing on the black thong post and the detailed white stitching around the footbed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the profile of the straps and the emblem placement.
attribute_logo: decorative emblem on the heel area of the footbed, shield-shaped, white on gray
